tool_args.label: Bridges and Tunnels Key Performance Metrics - October 2025
tool_args.raw_text: This performance metrics document was prepared for the October 2025 meeting of the Bridges and Tunnels Committee.

payload.title: Bridges and Tunnels Key Performance Metrics
payload.description: Performance metrics document prepared for the October 2025 meeting of the Bridges and Tunnels Committee, covering traffic, safety, enforcement, financial results, and major projects.

tool_args.label: MTA Bridges and Tunnels
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Bridges and Tunnels is comprised of over 1,000 employees and operates seven bridges and two tunnels in New York City

payload.description: MTA agency comprised of over 1,000 employees operating seven bridges and two tunnels in New York City, handling over 330 million vehicle crossings every year in addition to managing the Congestion Relief Zone.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Bridges and Tunnels is comprised of over 1,000 employees and operates seven bridges and two tunnels in New York City, handling over 330 million vehicle crossings every year in addition to managing the Congestion Relief Zone.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTAPD has supplemented patrol duties at the Henry Hudson, Marine Parkway–Gil Hodges Memorial, and Cross Bay Veterans Memorial bridges

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Throgs Neck Bridge Fender Protection
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development's B&T Business Unit continues to make strong progress on a $154 million design-build contract for upgrades to the existing tower fender system at the Throgs Neck Bridge.

payload.status: 65% complete, on track for early completion and within budget
payload.description: Upgrades to existing tower fender system at the Throgs Neck Bridge to better protect bridge towers against vessel collision, including painting of tower interiors and exteriors and other associated work. Includes new FDNY fireboat moorings, dry fire standpipe systems, tower elevator rehabilitation, lighting replacement, and main cable inspection. The $154 million contract is 65% complete and on track for early completion and within budget.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Construction & Development's B&T Business Unit continues to make strong progress on a $154 million design-build contract for upgrades to the existing tower fender system at the Throgs Neck Bridge.
The contract is now 65% complete and is on track for early completion and within budget.
the existing fender systems at the bridge's Bronx and Queens towers are being removed and replaced by a new precast concrete fender system

New FDNY fireboat moorings and dry fire standpipe systems at the bridge's towers; Rehabilitation of the tower elevators; Replacement of tower interior lighting, floodlights at fender and roadway levels, and navigation lighting on the new fendering systems; and Inspection of the bridge's main cables.
